data.body: A2 36d1 DONE+GREEN, pushed Gerrit change 390 (stacked on 389). RC2b: COMPACTION_HORIZON_NS config+env, include_retired plumbing (reduce_ticket/prepare_event_files/scan_for_latest_snapshot/replay_events), reduce_ticket event_files_override for subset compaction, compact horizon partition (young stay live, snapshot ts in gap), compact.rebuild_snapshot_from_full_log + fsck --repair-snapshots with .bak crash-safety, ADR 0035. Tests green. Now A3 34b1 (drive live-store fsck to zero — reuses A2 rebuild).
